name: Let Chat Guess
short_description: Let Chat Guess is a Twitch.tv interactive game that invites viewers to predict the distance a catapulted character will travel! Put your Twitch chat or friends to the test by challenging them to accurately guess the distance! Solo player? No worries! Climb the rankings and top the leaderboards!
detailed_description:
Welcome to Let Chat Guess, an exciting game where the ultimate challenge is to accurately predict the distance that a catapulted character will travel! Gather your Twitch chat, invite your friends, and let the guessing games begin!

But wait, this game isn't just for streamers – everyone can join in on the fun!


Even if you prefer to play solo, fear not! Take on the thrilling task of climbing the ranks and claim your spot at the top of the leaderboards!

With 4 captivating catapults, each operating on realistic physics, you'll experience an immersive gameplay like never before.
Select from a diverse cast of characters, each possessing unique attributes, and strategize to achieve the best results.

Are you ready to test your intuition and show off your skills?
Let Chat Guess awaits you!
